name: Tomaot & Hot Green Pepper Salad, Essaouira Style
recipeIngredient: 4 large Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and cubed
4 each Green bell peppers, grilled, seeded and diced
1 each Cucumber, peeled, center core removed and diced
1 tablespoon Chili peppers, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend gently.
3. Refrigerate for one hour before serving.
